# `vbmResetDisplayMode`

**Systems:** VIC20  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>vbmSetDisplayMode(  );</h3>



<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Reverts the Vic 20 back to normal character mode, restoring the screen and character addresses and 
    screen position to their previous state before vbmSetDisplayMode was called.
</p>


</div>
